title: Iran war drags India’s goods exports 7% lower in March — more pain ahead
summary_full: Iran war cuts India’s March goods exports by over 7%, hammering key sectors and markets, lifting costs and delaying recovery for months.
summary_public: Iran war cuts India’s March goods exports by over 7%, hammering key sectors and markets, lifting costs and delaying recovery for months.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran war cuts India’s March goods exports by over 7%
